title: AIAnnotationPrep
description: AI annotation preparation data. Generated by process-screenshot.mjs --ai-prep. Consumed by future AI annotation pipeline to auto-generate annotation configs. One file per (exchange × category × date).

_architecture.phase1_now: Humans create annotation configs manually using _schema.json
_architecture.phase2_soon: AI receives this prep file + screenshot, suggests annotations as AICandidate entries
_architecture.phase3_future: AI auto-generates full annotation config; human reviews and approves
_architecture.phase4_vision: AI pipeline end-to-end: detect → annotate → QA → deploy

screenshotPath.description: Public path to the processed screenshot

imageMeta.description: Technical image metadata for AI context

frameHeight.description: Pixels occupied by browser frame at top

captureContext.description: Context that helps AI understand what UI is shown

expectedUIElements.description: Human hint: what UI elements should be visible in this screenshot type

uiElementHints.description: Per-category expected UI elements for AI detection guidance

aiPromptTemplate.description: Template for the AI annotation prompt. {exchange}, {category}, {elements} are replaced at runtime.
aiPromptTemplate.default: You are an editorial screenshot annotator for a crypto exchange review site. The screenshot shows the {category} page of {exchange}. Identify the most important UI action a new user needs to perform. Suggest 1-3 annotations (arrow + callout, or focus ring) that guide the user's eye to that action. Expected UI elements: {elements}. Follow these constraints: arrows use #6C63FF, 2.5px, rounded. Callouts use dark glass style. Max 3 annotations total. Return JSON matching the annotation config schema.

detectedRegions.description: Populated by AI vision pass: detected UI regions with labels and bounding boxes

actionRelevance.description: How important this element is to the primary user action

suggestedAnnotations.description: Annotations suggested by AI, awaiting human review. Format matches _schema.json AICandidate.

generatedAt.description: ISO timestamp when this prep file was generated
